untranslatable_reason: The signal relies on calendar-based day-of-month filtering ('days 21-31') and index membership checking ('NIFTY 50 constituent'), neither of which are in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. Additionally, the core logic compares monthly high concentration percentages (42.7% vs 35.7%) which requires historical aggregation across month periods—this is a statistical property not available as a real-time indicator. The allowed indicators are price/technical only and do not support calendar operations or index membership queries.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a calendar/structural pattern that cannot be expressed with the provided technical indicators. It requires: (1) day-of-month extraction, (2) NIFTY 50 index membership lookup, and (3) aggregated monthly statistics. A practical implementation would need custom preprocessing layers outside the backtest engine's indicator set.
